summary: Excellent cassette recording of a standout 1988 Sunbelt show, with high‑energy performance and solid sound quality.
review: Fans rave about this concert as one of the best they ever saw, noting Brent's memorable playing and the overall vibe that puts the show over the top. The tape, sourced from first‑generation cassettes, delivers a clear and enjoyable listening experience despite being an audience capture.

ai_rating.rationale: Multiple reviewers give high marks for both the performance (one calls it one of the best shows) and the recording (described as excellent), though only a few detailed comments are available.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded from first‑generation cassette tapes; sound is clear enough to be called an excellent recording by reviewers, with typical tape warmth and minimal noise.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fans describe the concert as a high‑energy, well‑paced performance that captures the magic of the 1988 Sunbelt tour.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent's playing is fondly remembered and highlighted as part of why the show was special.
